name: Death
summary: Servants of death / decay / undead deities.

granted_power_l1.name: Bleeding Touch
granted_power_l1.summary: Standard action, melee touch; target takes 1d6 damage and starts bleeding 1d6/round (Fort DC 10 + 1/2 CL + Wis to halve duration). Usable 3 + Wis modifier times per day.
